<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Redis; use Predis\Command\Command as RedisCommand; /** * @see https://redis.io/commands/pexpiretime/ * * PEXPIRETIME has the same semantic as EXPIRETIME, * but returns the absolute Unix expiration timestamp in milliseconds instead of seconds. */ class PEXPIRETIME extends RedisCommand { public function getId() { return 'PEXPIRETIME'; } }
